recommendations.title: Frivolous Lola
recommendations.overview: In 1950s northern Italy, a woman tests her fiancé's love and passion by trying to break his commitment to premarital chastity.

recommendations.title: Summerland
recommendations.overview: A woman during the Second World War opens her heart to an evacuee after initially resolving to be rid of him.

recommendations.title: Fireflies in the Garden
recommendations.overview: The semi-autobiographical story centers on the complexities of love and commitment in a family torn apart when faced with an unexpected tragedy.

recommendations.title: Sweet Movie
recommendations.overview: The winner of the Miss World Virginity contest marries, escapes from her masochistic husband and ends up involved in a world of debauchery.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley's Lover
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: Lady Chatterley
recommendations.overview: After a crippling injury leaves her husband impotent, Lady Chatterly is torn between her love for her husband and her physical desires. With her husband's consent, she seeks out other means of fulfilling her needs.

recommendations.title: A Part of You
recommendations.overview: A teenager struggles to pick up the pieces of her shattered world in this emotional and bittersweet coming-of-age drama about those who are left behind.

recommendations.title: The Railway Children Return
recommendations.overview: Follow a group of children who are evacuated to a Yorkshire village during the Second World War, where they encounter a young soldier who, like them, is far away from home.

recommendations.title: Arthur
recommendations.overview: Arthur is a 30-year-old child who will inherit $750 million if he complies with his family's demands and marries the woman of their choosing.

recommendations.title: The Gatekeepers
recommendations.overview: In an unprecedented and candid series of interviews, six former heads of the Shin Bet — Israel's intelligence and security agency — speak about their role in Israel's decades-long counterterrorism campaign, discussing their controversial methods and
